description: Abyssal Depths Patch 5 (3 September 2025) — Economic Adjustments (Gold Market, Journal Silver rewards, Roaming Mobs, Black Zones, Territory Activity Chest, Conqueror's Chests, Avalonian Dungeons, Treasures, Boss Lairs, Hardcore Expeditions, The Depths), Other Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Economic Adjustments
sections.description: In response to Gold Market price increases, several economic adjustments to bring the market back in line.
items: Many Albion Journal missions that award Silver have had their rewards changed
Roaming Mobs now take slightly longer to charge up into more powerful mobs (10% change to upgrade frequency)
Loot Region Modifier for high-quality Black Zones: Quality 4 to 6 increase changed from +30% to +20% (now linear)
Chance that loot is generated for a Territory Activity Chest slightly decreased (~1.25% per level instead of 1.5%)
Price of Conqueror's Chests increased from 5,500 Favor to 6,750 Favor
Chests in Avalonian Dungeons have had their loot decreased by 10%
Small, Medium, and Large Treasures now spawn 10% less frequently
Boss Lair Maps spawn 25% less frequently
Hardcore Expeditions loot bonuses decreased by 10%
Depths: Chests at the Altar of Greed decreased by ~9.1%; Several chests yield ~25% less loot when looted by solo players; Might generated by player kills and Soul deliveries has been reduced
sections.searchable_text: Economic Adjustments Gold Market Journal Silver rewards Roaming Mobs Black Zones Loot Region Modifier Territory Activity Chest Conqueror's Chests Favor Avalonian Dungeons Treasures Boss Lairs Hardcore Expeditions Depths Altar of Greed solo loot Might player kills Soul deliveries

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: Crystal Offhand Artifacts can now be crafted from Crystal Shards
Adjusted Mists instance management to improve upon the changes previously made in Patch 4
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Crystal Offhand Artifacts Crystal Shards Mists instance management

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Freezing Wind (Frost Staffs): Fixed issue where enemies could be rooted after less than one second inside the area
Blood Ritual (Demonfang): Now correctly deals 20% of the caster's max health as true damage to the caster after the 3rd cast
[Mobile] Fixed issue where the entrance UI to the Depths would not show
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Freezing Wind Frost Staffs root one second area Blood Ritual Demonfang 20% max health true damage 3rd cast Mobile Depths entrance UI
